questions.question: What is the square of $9$?
questions.explanation: Squaring a number means multiplying it by itself: $9^2 = 9 \times 9 = 81$.

questions.question: Which of the following integers is a perfect square?
questions.explanation: A perfect square is the square of an integer. Since $7 \times 7 = 49$, it is a perfect square.

questions.question: What is the value of the algebraic expression $(-8)^2$?
questions.explanation: Squaring a negative number results in a positive value because negative times negative is positive: $(-8) \times (-8) = 64$.

questions.question: A square garden patch has a side length of $11$ meters. What is the garden's area?
questions.explanation: The area of a square is side squared. $\text{Area} = 11^2 = 11 \times 11 = 121$ square meters.
